symptom: Payments failing at checkout with HTTP 500 right after a deploy. Customers can't complete orders.
rootCause: A config change renamed the payment provider API key environment variable, but production was still setting the old name, so the payment client initialised with an undefined key.
resolution: Re-added the expected env var to the production config (and added a startup check that fails loudly when the payment key is missing).

symptom: Users stuck in a redirect loop on login; the dashboard keeps bouncing back to the sign-in page.
rootCause: A security hardening change set the session cookie SameSite attribute to Strict, so the cookie wasn't sent on the post-OAuth cross-site redirect.
resolution: Changed SameSite to Lax for the session cookie and added an integration test for the OAuth callback.

symptom: Image uploads started returning 403 Forbidden for all users this afternoon.
rootCause: An IAM policy update removed the s3:PutObject permission from the uploader role.
resolution: Restored the PutObject permission to the uploader role; scoped it to the uploads bucket prefix.

symptom: Search is extremely slow — p95 latency jumped from 120ms to 4s after the weekend.
rootCause: A schema migration dropped and didn't recreate the index on the products.name column, forcing full table scans.
resolution: Recreated the missing index and added a migration lint rule to flag dropped indexes.

symptom: Outbound webhooks are being dropped; partners report missing order events.
rootCause: The queue consumer was OOM-killed after a payload size increase and never restarted, so events piled up and expired.
resolution: Raised the consumer memory limit, added a dead-letter queue, and an alert on consumer restarts.

symptom: Transactional emails (receipts, password resets) stopped sending overnight.
rootCause: The email provider API key was rotated but the new key wasn't deployed to the worker service.
resolution: Deployed the rotated key to all services and moved the key to the shared secret store.
